display_information.name: Gemini AI Agent Backend
display_information.description: Production-ready serverless AI Agent powered by Express and Gemini 2.5 Flash.
display_information.long_description: A secure, serverless Slack AI Agent utilizing an Express and Node.js architecture optimized for Google Cloud Run. This backend integrates the official high-performance Gemini 2.5-flash SDK, resolves Slack's 3-second rapid response rules instantly, prevents bot retry storms/loop feedback, and validates cryptographic signatures securely.
